Our dashboards provide current status of registrations and our customer service team provides same-day response Monday through Friday.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5d5" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>With Mogul Register, do I still need a publishing administrator?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">It depends. With Mogul Register we will ensure you are registered to collect all of your royalties. The only exception here is international mechanicals, as the MLC does not collect internationally. For many artists, this doesn’t matter, but if you stream a lot internationally you would still want a publishing administrator.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5e1" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>Can I upgrade mid-year to a different membership if my needs change?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">Yes. If you upgrade you will receive a prorated price for your new membership.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion last-item"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5ed" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>How many artists/songwriters does each membership support?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">Each membership supports one person. If one person has multiple artist projects, they only require one membership. If you are a manager with 5 artists on your roster, you would need 5 memberships. These would all be interconnected to allow you to easily transition from dashboard to dashboard with a single log-in.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion last-item"><div data-w-id="221b921e-d94e-c9cb-2a9f-1e18b7cb96e0" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>I am a manager or business manager with a sizable roster, is Mogul still for me?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">Absolutely, in fact Mogul works with some of the top business managers and artists in the world. Reach out to our team at <a href="mailto:jeff@usemogul.com">jeff@usemogul.com</a> to jump on a call and discuss further.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div>
<section class="uui-section_faq01"><div class="uui-page-padding-4"><div class="uui-container-large-4"><div class="uui-padding-vertical-xhuge-4"><div class="uui-text-align-center-4"><div class="uui-max-width-large-4 align-center-5"><h2 class="text-block-19">Frequently asked questions</h2><div class="uui-space-xsmall-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_component"><div class="uui-faq01_list"><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5bd" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>How is your customer service? I’ve had issues with my pub admin and others.</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">From what our community of artists, managers, producers, and composers tell us, our customer service is the best out there. Our team is comprised of experts designed to demystify the world of royalties and registrations for you. We respond the same day Monday through Friday. If you hit us on the weekend, expect to hear back Monday. Your music business is our business, and we take it seriously. </div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5c9" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>How quickly will my music be registered?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">As soon as you begin submitting the required information through your dashboard we will begin the registration process. Our dashboards provide current status of registrations and our customer service team provides same-day response Monday through Friday.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5d5" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>With Mogul Register, do I still need a publishing administrator?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">It depends. With Mogul Register we will ensure you are registered to collect all of your royalties. The only exception here is international mechanicals, as the MLC does not collect internationally. For many artists, this doesn’t matter, but if you stream a lot internationally you would still want a publishing administrator.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5e1" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>Can I upgrade mid-year to a different membership if my needs change?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">Yes. If you upgrade you will receive a prorated price for your new membership.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion last-item"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5ed" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>How many artists/songwriters does each membership support?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">Each membership supports one person. If one person has multiple artist projects, they only require one membership. If you are a manager with 5 artists on your roster, you would need 5 memberships. These would all be interconnected to allow you to easily transition from dashboard to dashboard with a single log-in.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion last-item"><div data-w-id="221b921e-d94e-c9cb-2a9f-1e18b7cb96e0" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>I am a manager or business manager with a sizable roster, is Mogul still for me?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">Absolutely, in fact Mogul works with some of the top business managers and artists in the world. Reach out to our team at <a href="mailto:jeff@usemogul.com">jeff@usemogul.com</a> to jump on a call and discuss further.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></section>

 interactive: true,
})

</svg></div></div><div class="uui-text-size-medium-2">Store your contracts and get notified about key milestones</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><a href="#" id="mogul-register-tutorial-lightbox" class="lightbox-link w-inline-block w-lightbox" aria-label="open lightbox" aria-haspopup="dialog"><script type="application/json" class="w-json">{
  "items": [
    {
      "url": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PeCZBtdapdg",
      "originalUrl": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PeCZBtdapdg",
      "width": 940,
      "height": 528,
      "thumbnailUrl": "https://i.ytimg.com/vi/PeCZBtdapdg/hqdefault.jpg",
      "html": "<iframe class=\"embedly-embed\" src=\"//cdn.embedly.com/widgets/media.html?src=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fembed%2FPeCZBtdapdg%3Ffeature%3Doembed&display_name=YouTube&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DPeCZBtdapdg&image=https%3A%2F%2Fi.ytimg.com%2Fvi%2FPeCZBtdapdg%2Fhqdefault.jpg&type=text%2Fhtml&schema=youtube\" width=\"940\" height=\"528\" scrolling=\"no\" title=\"YouTube embed\" frameborder=\"0\" allow=\"autoplay; fullscreen; encrypted-media; picture-in-picture;\" allowfullscreen=\"true\"></iframe>",
      "type": "video"
    }
  ],
  "group": ""
}</script></a></section><div class="uui-faq01_cta"><div class="uui-text-align-center-4"><h4 class="uui-heading-xxsmall-3">Interested in an enterprise solution?</h4><div class="uui-space-xxsmall"></div><div class="uui-button-row button-row-center is-reverse-mobile-landscape"><a href="mailto:jeff@usemogul.com?subject=Enterprise%20Solution" class="uui-button-4 w-inline-block"><div class="text-block-21">Get in touch</div></a></div></div></div><section class="uui-section_faq01"><div class="uui-page-padding-4"><div class="uui-container-large-4"><div class="uui-padding-vertical-xhuge-4"><div class="uui-text-align-center-4"><div class="uui-max-width-large-4 align-center-5"><h2 class="text-block-19">Frequently asked questions</h2><div class="uui-space-xsmall-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_component"><div class="uui-faq01_list"><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5bd" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>How is your customer service? I’ve had issues with my pub admin and others.</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">From what our community of artists, managers, producers, and composers tell us, our customer service is the best out there. Our team is comprised of experts designed to demystify the world of royalties and registrations for you. We respond the same day Monday through Friday. If you hit us on the weekend, expect to hear back Monday. Your music business is our business, and we take it seriously. </div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5c9" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>How quickly will my music be registered?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">As soon as you begin submitting the required information through your dashboard we will begin the registration process. Our dashboards provide current status of registrations and our customer service team provides same-day response Monday through Friday.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5d5" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>With Mogul Register, do I still need a publishing administrator?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">It depends. With Mogul Register we will ensure you are registered to collect all of your royalties. The only exception here is international mechanicals, as the MLC does not collect internationally. For many artists, this doesn’t matter, but if you stream a lot internationally you would still want a publishing administrator.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5e1" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>Can I upgrade mid-year to a different membership if my needs change?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">Yes. If you upgrade you will receive a prorated price for your new membership.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion last-item"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5ed" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>How many artists/songwriters does each membership support?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">Each membership supports one person. If one person has multiple artist projects, they only require one membership. If you are a manager with 5 artists on your roster, you would need 5 memberships. These would all be interconnected to allow you to easily transition from dashboard to dashboard with a single log-in.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion last-item"><div data-w-id="221b921e-d94e-c9cb-2a9f-1e18b7cb96e0" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>I am a manager or business manager with a sizable roster, is Mogul still for me?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">Absolutely, in fact Mogul works with some of the top business managers and artists in the world. Reach out to our team at <a href="mailto:jeff@usemogul.com">jeff@usemogul.com</a> to jump on a call and discuss further.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></section><section class="uui-section_pricing11 hide-tablet-2"></section><div class="section_footer"><div class="padding-global"><div class="container-large"><div class="padding-section-small"><div class="footer-top"><a href="/" class="footer-link">Home</a><a href="/whos-it-for" class="footer-link">Who's it for?</a><a href="#" class="footer-link">Pricing</a><a href="/partners" class="footer-link">Partners</a><a href="https://app.usemogul.com" class="footer-link">Log In</a></div><div class="footer-line"></div><div class="footer-bottom"><div class="bottom-footer-left"><a href="/terms" class="sub-links">Terms of Service</a><a href="/privacy-policy" class="sub-links">Privacy Policy</a><a href="mailto:info@usemogul.com" class="sub-links">info@usemogul.com</a><a href="/blog" class="sub-links">Blog</a><a href="https://help.usemogul.com" class="sub-links">Help Center</a><div class="text-size-tiny text-color-light-gray">© 2025 Mogul. All Rights Reserved.</div></div><div class="bottom-right-footer"><a href="https://tiktok.com/@usemogul" target="_blank" class="social-link w-inline-block"><img href="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65a997ed5f68daf1805ed385/65a9d780a1a3470ad30fad18_6509c6fed4096a94504ffe60_Mogul%20App%20Icon%20256x256.png" rel="apple-touch-icon"><!-- Cookie Consent -->
<script>
  function setCookieConsent(value) {
    localStorage.setItem('cookie_consent', value);
  }

  function getCookieConsent() {
    return localStorage.getItem('cookie_consent');
  }

  function loadGoogleAnalytics() {
    if (window.gaLoaded) return;
    window.gaLoaded = true;

    const s = document.createElement('script');
    s.src = "https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-NKD3SFCJBR";
    s.async = true;
    document.head.appendChild(s);

    s.onload = function () {
      window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
      function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
      gtag('js', new Date());
      gtag('config', 'G-NKD3SFCJBR', { anonymize_ip: true });
    };
  }

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const banner = document.querySelector('[data-cookie-banner]');
    const acceptBtn = document.querySelector('[data-cookie="accept"]');
    const refuseBtn = document.querySelector('[data-cookie="deny"]');
    const exitBtn = document.querySelector('[data-cookie-banner-exit="true"]');

    const consent = getCookieConsent();

    // Handle previously saved consent
    if (consent === "accepted") {
      loadGoogleAnalytics();
      if (banner) banner.style.display = "none";
      return;
    }

    if (consent === "refused") {
      if (banner) banner.style.display = "none";
      return;
    }

    // Accept
    if (acceptBtn) {
      acceptBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
        setCookieConsent("accepted");
        loadGoogleAnalytics();
        if (banner) banner.style.display = "none";
      });
    }

    // Refuse
    if (refuseBtn) {
      refuseBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
        setCookieConsent("refused");
        if (banner) banner.style.display = "none";
      });
    }

    // Exit / close (NO persistence)
    if (exitBtn) {
      exitBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
        if (banner) banner.style.display = "none";
        // intentionally do NOT save anything
      });
    }
  });
</script>

}</script></a></section><div class="uui-faq01_cta"><div class="uui-text-align-center-4"><h4 class="uui-heading-xxsmall-3">Interested in an enterprise solution?</h4><div class="uui-space-xxsmall"></div><div class="uui-button-row button-row-center is-reverse-mobile-landscape"><a href="mailto:jeff@usemogul.com?subject=Enterprise%20Solution" class="uui-button-4 w-inline-block"><div class="text-block-21">Get in touch</div></a></div></div></div><section class="uui-section_faq01"><div class="uui-page-padding-4"><div class="uui-container-large-4"><div class="uui-padding-vertical-xhuge-4"><div class="uui-text-align-center-4"><div class="uui-max-width-large-4 align-center-5"><h2 class="text-block-19">Frequently asked questions</h2><div class="uui-space-xsmall-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_component"><div class="uui-faq01_list"><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5bd" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>How is your customer service? I’ve had issues with my pub admin and others.</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">From what our community of artists, managers, producers, and composers tell us, our customer service is the best out there. Our team is comprised of experts designed to demystify the world of royalties and registrations for you. We respond the same day Monday through Friday. If you hit us on the weekend, expect to hear back Monday. Your music business is our business, and we take it seriously. </div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5c9" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>How quickly will my music be registered?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">As soon as you begin submitting the required information through your dashboard we will begin the registration process. Our dashboards provide current status of registrations and our customer service team provides same-day response Monday through Friday.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5d5" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>With Mogul Register, do I still need a publishing administrator?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">It depends. With Mogul Register we will ensure you are registered to collect all of your royalties. The only exception here is international mechanicals, as the MLC does not collect internationally. For many artists, this doesn’t matter, but if you stream a lot internationally you would still want a publishing administrator.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5e1" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>Can I upgrade mid-year to a different membership if my needs change?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">Yes. If you upgrade you will receive a prorated price for your new membership.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion last-item"><div data-w-id="8f8a3a5e-d8e5-5f60-746e-e27247f4b5ed" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>How many artists/songwriters does each membership support?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">Each membership supports one person. If one person has multiple artist projects, they only require one membership. If you are a manager with 5 artists on your roster, you would need 5 memberships. These would all be interconnected to allow you to easily transition from dashboard to dashboard with a single log-in.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div><div class="uui-faq01_accordion last-item"><div data-w-id="221b921e-d94e-c9cb-2a9f-1e18b7cb96e0" class="uui-faq01_question"><div class="uui-faq01_heading"><strong>I am a manager or business manager with a sizable roster, is Mogul still for me?</strong></div><div class="uui-faq01_icon-wrapper"><div class="accordion-icon_component"><div class="accordion-icon_horizontal-line"></div><div class="accordion-icon_vertical-line"></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px;" class="uui-faq01_answer"><div class="uui-text-size-medium-4">Absolutely, in fact Mogul works with some of the top business managers and artists in the world. Reach out to our team at <a href="mailto:jeff@usemogul.com">jeff@usemogul.com</a> to jump on a call and discuss further.</div><div class="uui-space-medium-3"></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></section><section class="uui-section_pricing11 hide-tablet-2"></section><div class="section_footer"><div class="padding-global"><div class="container-large"><div class="padding-section-small"><div class="footer-top"><a href="/" class="footer-link">Home</a><a href="/whos-it-for" class="footer-link">Who's it for?</a><a href="#" class="footer-link">Pricing</a><a href="/partners" class="footer-link">Partners</a><a href="https://app.usemogul.com" class="footer-link">Log In</a></div><div class="footer-line"></div><div class="footer-bottom"><div class="bottom-footer-left"><a href="/terms" class="sub-links">Terms of Service</a><a href="/privacy-policy" class="sub-links">Privacy Policy</a><a href="mailto:info@usemogul.com" class="sub-links">info@usemogul.com</a><a href="/blog" class="sub-links">Blog</a><a href="https://help.usemogul.com" class="sub-links">Help Center</a><div class="text-size-tiny text-color-light-gray">© 2025 Mogul. })
